description_for_human: SpyCloud darknet intelligence for Security Copilot. 200+ skills across 9 APIs, 14 Sentinel tables, 23 sub-agents with KQL, API, and AI-powered investigation capabilities.
description_for_model:
SpyCloud Threat Intelligence — the ultimate Security Copilot plugin suite providing total darknet intelligence coverage. This solution connects to ALL 9 SpyCloud APIs and 14 custom Microsoft Sentinel tables to deliver comprehensive investigation, enrichment, remediation, and reporting capabilities.

The suite spans 3 integrated plugins with 200+ total skills:

1. KQL Plugin (120+ skills): Queries ALL 14 custom Sentinel tables — SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL, SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL, SpyCloudCompassData_CL, SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL, SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL, SpyCloudSipCookies_CL, SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL, SpyCloudInvestigations_CL, SpyCloudIdLink_CL, SpyCloudDataPartnership_CL, SpyCloudExposure_CL, SpyCloudCAP_CL, Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL, SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL — covering user investigation, password analysis, breach catalog, Compass consumer identity, UEBA correlation, Fusion multistage detection, cross-connector threat hunting, risk scoring, executive reporting, remediation audit, identity graph correlation, partner intelligence, exposure risk profiling, and credential automated protection.

2. API Plugin (35+ skills): Direct REST API access to ALL 9 SpyCloud APIs — Enterprise Breach, Compass Investigation, Identity Exposure, Session Identity Protection (SIP), Investigations, IDLINK (identity correlation), Data Partnership (partner intelligence), Exposure (risk assessment), and CAP (credential automated protection) — for real-time lookups by email, domain, IP, username, password, identity graph, and policy.

3. Investigation Agent (23 sub-agents, 12 AI analysis skills): Autonomous conversational agent orchestrating 23 specialized sub-agents including UEBA behavioral analysis, Fusion multistage attack correlation, TI enrichment & IOC analysis, session cookie & MFA bypass detection, lateral movement tracking, data exfiltration detection, executive summary & compliance reporting, watchlist management, ransomware impact assessment, identity risk scoring, supply chain exposure analysis, dark web monitoring, Defender XDR endpoint analysis, Intune device compliance, CASB cloud app security, Compass deep forensics, IDLINK identity correlation, Data Partnership intelligence, Exposure risk assessment, CAP response management, OpenAI advanced analysis (executive reports, board presentations, predictive analytics, attack simulation), and Cross-API investigation orchestration. 12 GPT-4o AI analysis skills provide threat narrative construction, compliance assessment, executive briefings, threat intel correlation, response playbook design, board presentations, exposure forecasting, attack simulation, risk heatmaps, and incident narratives.

The solution integrates with 71+ analytics rule templates, 28 hunting queries, 14 automated remediation playbooks, 13 focused workbooks, 3 Jupyter notebooks, 4 watchlists, 4 automation rules, and UEBA/Fusion detection across Microsoft Sentinel. All analytics, playbooks, and workbooks deploy as templates (disabled by default) for selective enablement.

API Key Architecture: Enterprise and Compass share a single API key. IDLINK, Data Partnership, Exposure, and CAP each require separate dedicated API keys. Optional OpenAI API key enables advanced AI analysis capabilities.

plugins.name: SpyCloud KQL Plugin
plugins.description: Queries 14 SpyCloud Sentinel tables for credential exposure, breach catalog, device forensics, identity graphing, remediation audit, and compliance monitoring.

plugins.name: SpyCloud API Plugin
plugins.auth: API Key (X-API-Key header, per-API keys for IDLINK/DataPartnership/Exposure/CAP)
plugins.description: Direct REST API access to SpyCloud for real-time darknet intelligence lookups across Enterprise, Compass, Identity, SIP, Investigations, IDLINK, Data Partnership, Exposure, and CAP APIs.

plugins.name: SpyCloud Investigation Agent
plugins.auth: None (uses Sentinel workspace connection; optional API keys for API-backed and OpenAI skills)
plugins.description: Autonomous agent with 23 sub-agents, 12 AI analysis skills, and 65 KQL skills for investigating threats across 9 SpyCloud APIs and 14 Sentinel tables.

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
custom_tables.description: Enterprise Breach API watchlist - compromised credentials, PII, device forensics, passwords, infostealer artifacts

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
custom_tables.description: Breach catalog metadata - title, description, category, record counts, confidence scores, malware family

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCompassData_CL
custom_tables.description: Compass deep infostealer records - stolen cookies, browser autofill, crypto wallets, installed software, C2 infrastructure

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCompassDevices_CL
custom_tables.description: Compass infected device fingerprints - hostname, OS, IPs, infection timeline, application counts

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCompassApplications_CL
custom_tables.description: Compass application targets - URLs, domains, credential/cookie counts per infected machine

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudSipCookies_CL
custom_tables.description: Stolen session cookies by domain - cookie name/value/expiration, secure/httpOnly flags, infection context

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudIdentityExposure_CL
custom_tables.description: Identity exposure profiles - deduplicated credential risk posture per identity with severity scoring

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudInvestigations_CL
custom_tables.description: Investigations API - full database searches across breaches, infostealers, phishing, paste sites, combo lists

custom_tables.name: Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
custom_tables.description: MDE remediation audit log - device isolation, tagging, IOC actions (internal, not API-sourced)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
custom_tables.description: CA remediation audit log - password resets, session revocations, CA group assignments (internal, not API-sourced)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudIdLink_CL
custom_tables.description: IDLINK identity correlation - unified identity graphs, linked accounts/devices/credentials across breaches
custom_tables.requires: IDLINK API entitlement (enableIdLink, separate API key)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudDataPartnership_CL
custom_tables.description: Partner-contributed darknet intelligence from trusted data sharing partnerships
custom_tables.requires: Data Partnership API entitlement (enableDataPartnership, separate API key)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudExposure_CL
custom_tables.description: Aggregated exposure risk assessments with scoring, timeline analysis, and remediation recommendations
custom_tables.requires: Exposure API entitlement (enableExposure, separate API key)

custom_tables.name: SpyCloudCAP_CL
custom_tables.description: Credential Access Program - automated credential protection policies, resets, and lifecycle management
custom_tables.requires: CAP API entitlement (enableCAP, separate API key)

sentinel_integration.playbook_deployment: Templates (deploy from Sentinel > Automation > Playbook Templates)
sentinel_integration.workbook_deployment: Separate focused workbooks (one per data source, not multi-tab)

spycloud_apis: Enterprise Breach API (shared key with Compass)
Compass Investigation API (shared key with Enterprise)

setup_instructions:
## Security Copilot Plugin Installation

IMPORTANT: Do NOT upload this manifest.json to Security Copilot. Upload the individual YAML plugin files instead.

### Step 1: Install the KQL Plugin (No API Key Required)
1. In Security Copilot: Sources > Manage plugins > Custom > Add plugin
2. Upload format: **Security Copilot plugin**
3. Upload file: `SpyCloud_Plugin.yaml`
4. Configure settings when prompted:
   - TenantId: Your Azure AD tenant ID
   - SubscriptionId: Azure subscription containing Sentinel
   - ResourceGroupName: Resource group containing Sentinel workspace
   - WorkspaceName: Log Analytics workspace name
5. No API key needed — uses your Sentinel workspace connection
6. Provides 120+ skills across ALL 14 SpyCloud Sentinel tables

### Step 2: Install the API Plugin (SpyCloud API Key Required)
1. In Security Copilot: Sources > Manage plugins > Custom > Add plugin
2. Upload format: **Security Copilot plugin**
3. Upload file: `SpyCloud_API_Plugin.yaml`
4. When prompted for API Key authentication, enter your SpyCloud Enterprise/Compass API key as the Value
5. The plugin automatically sends it as the X-API-Key header
6. Get your API key: Log in to portal.spycloud.com > Account Settings > API Keys
7. Provides 35+ skills across ALL 9 SpyCloud APIs

### Step 3: Install the Investigation Agent (Optional API Keys)
1. In Security Copilot: Sources > Manage plugins > Custom > Add plugin
2. Upload format: **Security Copilot plugin**
3. Upload file: `SpyCloud_Agent.yaml`
4. Configure required settings: TenantId, SubscriptionId, ResourceGroupName, WorkspaceName
5. Configure optional settings for enhanced capabilities:
   - SpyCloudApiKey: Enterprise/Compass API key for API-backed skills
   - IdLinkApiKey: IDLINK API key for identity correlation
   - DataPartnershipApiKey: Data Partnership API key
   - ExposureApiKey: Exposure API key for risk assessments
   - CAPApiKey: CAP API key for credential protection
   - OpenAIApiKey: OpenAI API key for advanced AI analysis, executive reports, and board presentations
6. Provides 23 sub-agents, 12 AI analysis skills, 65 KQL skills

### API Key Architecture
| API | Key Type | Required | Shared With |
|-----|----------|----------|-------------|
| Enterprise Breach | Enterprise API Key | Yes | Compass |
| Compass Investigation | Enterprise API Key | No (Enterprise+ tier) | Enterprise |
| Identity Exposure | Enterprise API Key | Auto-enabled | Enterprise |
| SIP | SIP API Key | No (SIP entitlement) | — |
| Investigations | Investigations API Key | No (Investigations entitlement) | — |
| IDLINK | IDLINK API Key | No (separate key) | — |
| Data Partnership | Data Partnership API Key | No (separate key) | — |
| Exposure | Exposure API Key | No (separate key) | — |
| CAP | CAP API Key | No (separate key) | — |
| OpenAI | OpenAI API Key | No (optional) | — |

### SpyCloud API Endpoints Used (35+ endpoints)
The API Plugin connects to https://api.spycloud.io:

**Enterprise API (shared key with Compass):**
| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| /enterprise-v2/breach/data/emails/{email} | Credentials exposed for an email |
| /enterprise-v2/breach/data/emails?domain={domain} | All exposures for a domain |
| /enterprise-v2/breach/data/ips/{ip} | Exposures for an IP |
| /enterprise-v2/breach/data/usernames/{username} | Exposures for a username |
| /enterprise-v2/breach/data/passwords | Password exposure check |
| /enterprise-v2/breach/catalog | Browse breach sources |
| /enterprise-v2/breach/catalog/{id} | Breach details |

**Compass API (shared key with Enterprise):**
| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| /compass/data/emails/{email} | Deep infostealer data for email |
| /compass/data/emails?domain={domain} | Infostealer data for domain |
| /compass/data/ips/{ip} | Infostealer data for IP |

**Identity & SIP APIs:**
| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| /enterprise-v2/breach/data/identities | Identity exposure profiles |
| /enterprise-v2/breach/data/watchlist?type=corporate | Watchlist exposure |
| /sip/breach/data/cookie-domains/{domain} | Stolen session cookies |

**Investigations API:**
| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| /investigations-v2/data/emails/{email} | Full database search by email |
| /investigations-v2/data/emails?domain={domain} | Full database search by domain |
| /investigations-v2/data/ips/{ip} | Full database search by IP |
| /investigations-v2/data/usernames/{username} | Full database search by username |
| /investigations-v2/data/passwords | Full database search by password |

**IDLINK API (separate key):**
| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| /idlink-v1/identity/emails/{email} | Identity links for email |
| /idlink-v1/identity/domains/{domain} | Identity links for domain |
| /idlink-v1/identity/{identity_id} | Specific identity record |
| /idlink-v1/identity/{identity_id}/graph | Identity relationship graph |

**Data Partnership API (separate key):**
| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| /data-partnership-v1/breach/data/emails/{email} | Partner data for email |
| /data-partnership-v1/breach/data/domains/{domain} | Partner data for domain |
| /data-partnership-v1/breach/catalog | Partner breach catalog |

**Exposure API (separate key):**
| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| /exposure-v1/exposure/emails/{email} | Exposure risk for email |
| /exposure-v1/exposure/domains/{domain} | Exposure risk for domain |
| /exposure-v1/exposure/ips/{ip} | Exposure risk for IP |
| /exposure-v1/exposure/summary | Organization-wide exposure summary |

**CAP API (separate key):**
| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| /cap-v1/credentials/emails/{email} | CAP actions for email |
| /cap-v1/credentials/domains/{domain} | CAP actions for domain |
| /cap-v1/policies | List CAP policies |
| /cap-v1/credentials/reset | Trigger credential reset |

### API Authentication
All SpyCloud API endpoints use the X-API-Key header for authentication.
Test your key: curl -H 'X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY' https://api.spycloud.io/enterprise-v2/breach/catalog?limit=1

### Required Permissions
- KQL Plugin: Reader access to the Sentinel Log Analytics workspace
- API Plugin: Valid SpyCloud API key(s) — Enterprise key required, other API keys optional based on entitlements
- Agent: Reader access to Sentinel workspace + optional API keys for enhanced capabilities
- OpenAI Skills: Valid OpenAI API key (for executive reports, board presentations, predictive analytics)
- Playbooks: Managed identity permissions for Microsoft Graph, MDE, and Sentinel APIs
